summary: Tested new RBAC admin feature end-to-end. Backend: 15/15 tests pass covering stats/users/role/delete + 403 for normal users + self-demote/self-delete blocks + invalid ids + tracker regression. Frontend: admin sees Admin nav + panel with 4 stat cards + user rows with disabled action buttons on own row (shows '(tu)'); role toggle to admin and back works with row update; normal user does NOT see Admin nav and is redirected from /app/admin to /app; all core nav items present.
critical_code_review_comments: admin.py delete_user cascade covers most collections; verify all user-scoped collections are listed (e.g. any newly added ones).
Admin.jsx: silent try/catch on stats/users load hides real errors; consider showing toast on load failure.
PATCH role uses 400 for both invalid role string and self-demote; consider distinct error codes for clarity (minor).
seed_data_creation: Test-only users created via /api/auth/register with prefix rbac_/test_; throwaway user cleaned up via delete_user endpoint; other rbac_ users remain (~3) but do not affect functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC feature verified complete. Admin panel routing (AdminOnly guard) works, sidebar filter by role works, self-protection works both server and client side. If more admin features added, extend /app/backend/tests/test_admin_rbac.py.
